slight.clothed: a slight, narrow build that fabric hangs loosely from, offering little to fill the silhouette
slight.naked: a narrow ribcage, shallow chest depth, and thin clavicles — built for agility rather than power

compact.clothed: a compact, dense stature where clothing sits close, hinting at solid structure beneath
compact.naked: a well-knit frame with dense, close-set bones and a surprisingly solid core for his size

average.clothed: a standard masculine frame that fills clothing evenly without excess or absence
average.naked: a proportionate masculine skeleton — natural torso depth, unremarkable in scale but symmetrical and functional

heavy.clothed: a heavy, barrel-chested build that pulls fabric taut across the chest and back
heavy.naked: a thick, deep ribcage with a broad back and heavy bone structure — built to carry weight

massive.clothed: an immense, hulking presence where even loose clothing struggles to contain his upper body
massive.naked: an enormous skeletal frame with extraordinary girth — wide, deep, and built on a scale that dwarfs most men

thin.clothed: arms that leave sleeves largely unfilled, fabric draping loosely around slender limbs
thin.naked: wiry, sinewy arms with visible tendons beneath thin skin — functional but lacking mass

athletic.clothed: arms that fill their sleeves with lean, capable muscle — not bulging, but clearly present
athletic.naked: well-defined biceps and firm forearms with visible muscle separation, carrying little excess flesh

brawny.clothed: thick, powerful arms pressing noticeably against fabric, sleeves stretched taut around heavy muscle
brawny.naked: massive, dense biceps and thick, corded forearms — muscle bunching visibly with even small movements

colossal.clothed: arms of extraordinary size that strain against any covering, their girth impossible to conceal
colossal.naked: immense, over-developed arms where the bicep peaks dramatically and the forearm carries thick ropes of muscle

narrow.clothed: shoulders that leave clothing looking slightly oversized, fabric slipping inward rather than pushed out
narrow.naked: slight, narrow shoulders with little lateral breadth — deltoids underdeveloped, clavicles close-set

average.clothed: shoulders that sit squarely within clothing, filling the seams without straining them
average.naked: naturally squared shoulders of typical width — deltoids rounded but not imposing, the frame balanced

broad.clothed: broad shoulders pulling fabric outward across the upper back, creating a commanding silhouette
broad.naked: wide, powerful shoulders where the deltoids flare visibly, creating a pronounced V-taper to the waist

expansive.clothed: an extraordinary shoulder width dominating any silhouette — fabric stretched across the upper back in a sweeping span
expansive.naked: an almost architectural span of shoulder — the deltoids massively developed, the clavicles wide, the upper frame overwhelming in its breadth

ripped.clothed: a narrow, tightly drawn waist the fabric clings to, the flat stomach pressing cleanly against the cloth
ripped.naked: a shredded midsection with clearly segmented abdominals, deep oblique cuts, and almost no subcutaneous fat

tapered.clothed: a cleanly tapered waist giving his silhouette a natural V-shape, cloth lying flat against a trim stomach
tapered.naked: a lean, athletic waist with visible obliques and a flat stomach — lightly defined but not dramatically cut

straight.clothed: a solid, straight midsection giving clothing a blocky, even hang without taper or protrusion
straight.naked: a natural, blocky masculine waist — flat but unrefined, carrying a thin, even layer of flesh over the abdominal wall

thick.clothed: a thick, powerful core pushing outward against fabric across the entire midsection
thick.naked: a wide, heavy waist dense with muscle and a solid layer of flesh — built for labor rather than aesthetics

potbellied.clothed: a rounded belly pressing noticeably against fabric, the midsection straining the cloth outward
potbellied.naked: a distended, soft stomach protruding forward with a rounded hang — the abdominal wall buried beneath a thick, yielding layer of fat

flat.clothed: a flat rear leaving the back of clothing loose, adding nothing to the lower silhouette
flat.naked: lean, almost absent glutes — thin and flat, offering little projection from the lower back

firm.clothed: a solid, well-shaped rear filling the back of clothing naturally, fabric resting snugly over developed muscle
firm.naked: firm, dense gluteal muscles with good projection and definition — built from heavy use rather than vanity

large.clothed: a heavy, powerful rear filling and stretching the back of any covering, the shape impossible to disguise
large.naked: large, thickly muscled glutes with substantial mass and projection — heavily developed and imposing

huge.clothed: a massively wide rear straining fabric at the seat and hips, creating an unavoidable presence
huge.naked: enormous, fleshy glutes with a wide, heavy spread — more fat than muscle, soft and overflowing in scale

spindly.clothed: legs that leave trouser fabric loose and shapeless, offering little structure beneath the cloth
spindly.naked: bony, narrow thighs with thin, underdeveloped quads and calves lacking any substantial muscle mass

athletic.clothed: lean, capable legs filling their covering evenly — not dramatic, but clearly functional
athletic.naked: toned quadriceps with clean muscle separation, firm hamstrings, and defined calves — built for endurance and speed

pillars.clothed: thick, powerful legs pressing against their covering at the thigh, fabric stretched across dense muscle
pillars.naked: massive, heavy thighs packed with muscle pressing together at the inner surface — calves equally thick and deeply developed

immense.clothed: legs of extraordinary size straining any covering to its limit, the mass of the thighs impossible to conceal
immense.naked: truly enormous thighs — over-developed to a staggering scale, the muscle striated and heavy, calves like solid stone beneath the skin

shredded.clothed: hard and defined even beneath clothing, sharp muscle edges pressing through fabric
shredded.naked: extremely low body fat revealing every striation and vein — muscle separated and visible even at rest

muscular.clothed: powerfully built in a way clothing cannot fully contain — muscle pressing against fabric at the chest, arms, and thighs
muscular.naked: hard, well-developed muscle across every major group with low body fat — imposing in mass and clearly the product of intense conditioning

athletic.clothed: fit and capable beneath his clothing — the silhouette trim and functional without being extreme
athletic.naked: lean muscle with a natural, healthy layer of flesh — toned without being dramatic, the body of someone who uses it rather than trains it

solid.clothed: thick and sturdy beneath his clothing — not fat, not lean, but heavy and immovable in presence
solid.naked: powerful muscle buried under a solid, even layer of fat — dense and heavy, strength present but hidden beneath a blunt exterior

soft.clothed: a soft, heavy silhouette where clothing hangs without tension, the body offering little muscle definition
soft.naked: little visible muscle tone, the body carrying a uniform soft layer of flesh that smooths over any underlying structure

heavy.clothed: a bulky, fleshy build that clothing strains to accommodate, the silhouette broad and rounded
heavy.naked: thick, uneven layers of soft fat across the torso and limbs — heavy and largely unconditioned

obese.clothed: an extremely heavy build pressing outward against fabric in every direction, the silhouette dominated by soft mass
obese.naked: heavy, overhanging folds of soft flesh across the abdomen, chest, and upper arms — carrying an extraordinary amount of fat with no visible muscle conditioning
